description: CompositionBlack layered sweater made of 100% cotton, has a mock shirt collar and button placket attached to the sides of the buttoned cardigan with full sleevesFitRegular  Wash care Machine wash with warm water using a non chlorine bleachTumble dry lowWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationsDo not dry cleanNothing exudes class and elegance as much as an s.oliver sweater. Wear this classic style to any off-duty or formal event to look your stylish best. Pair it with classic denims, and casual shoes to snazz up your style.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
